zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Nilsson Lycon於1640年出生在瑞典額雷布洛尼亞 可帕波格時，他的父親Nils Nilsson29歲，母親Margeta Olofsdotter30歲。他於1662年與Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo在瑞典維亞姆藍德根納申可格結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1693年在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞享年54歲，埋葬在美國賓夕法尼亞州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Nilsson Lycon于1640年出生在瑞典額雷布洛尼亞 可帕波格时，他的父亲Nils Nilsson29岁，母亲Margeta Olofsdotter30岁。他于1662年与Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo在瑞典維亞姆藍德根納申可格结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1693年在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞享年54岁，埋葬在美国宾夕法尼亚州費拉德爾福亞費拉德爾福亞。

nameMeanings.name: Lycon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Carlos, Jose, Juan, Armando, Arturo, Manuel, Miguel, Octavio, Rafael, Ramon, Ricardo.
Hispanic (mainly Mexico): probably an altered form of Basque   Licona  .

variants.name: Licona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Pablo, Alberto, Candida Rosa, Francisco, Guillermo, Jesus, Juan, Adan, Alfonso, Alfredo, Andres.
Basque: Castilianized form of Likona, a habitational name from Likoa, in Biscay (Basque Country, Spain).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Nilsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Nils, Per, Anders, Egil, Lennart, Sven, Birgit, Fredrik, Sten, Algot.  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Gerhard, Gotthard, Karl-Heinz.
Swedish and German: patronymic from the personal name Nils, a shortened form of Nikolaus. Compare Nilson , Neilson 3, and Nielson 2.

variants.name: Nilson
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic from   Will .  Use as a given name in the United States was inspired by President (Thomas) Woodrow Wilson (  1856–1924 );  compare the similar adoption as a given name of  Woodrow .

historicEvents.description: Queen Christina abdicated throne. Converted to Catholicism, later buried in Rome in St. Peter's.

Historical Boundaries: 1682: Pennsylvania, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1685: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States
King Charles II barred Jews from settling in Stockholm.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Nilsson Lycon was born in 1640, in Nya Kopparberg, Örebro, Sweden, his father, Nils Nilsson, was 29 and his mother, Margeta Olofsdotter, was 30. He married Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo in 1662, in Gunnarskog, Värmland, Sweden. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1693, in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 54, and was buried in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Nilsson Lycon est né en 1640, à Nya Kopparberg, Örebro, Suède, son père, Nils Nilsson, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margeta Olofsdotter, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo en 1662, à Gunnarskog, Värmland, Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1693, à Philadelphie, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Nilsson Lycon 1640 in Nya Kopparberg, Örebro, Schweden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nils Nilsson 29 und seine Mutter Margeta Olofsdotter 30. Er hat 1662 in Gunnarskog, Värmland, Schweden Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1693 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Philadelphia, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

Lui sposato Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo nel 1662, nel Gunnarskog, Värmland, Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Peter Nilsson Lyconが1640年にスウェーデンoレブロニーア コッパルバーグで生まれた時，父Nils Nilssonは29歳，母Margeta Olofsdotterは30歳であった。1662年にスウェーデンvaルムランドグナルスコグでCatherine Mattson Peterson Ramboと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1693年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアで54歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州フィラデルフィアフィラデルフィアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Nilsson Lycon(이)가 1640년 스웨덴 o레브로 니아 코파르버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nils Nilsson(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeta Olofsdotter(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1662년 스웨덴 브a랜드 건아르스코그에서 Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1693년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 펜실베이니아 주 필라들필아 필라들필아에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo em 1662, em Gunnarskog, Värmland, Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Nilsson Lycon родился в 1640 г. в местности ня коппарбирг, oребро, Швеция, его отцу по имени Nils Nilsson было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margeta Olofsdotter, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Mattson Peterson Rambo в 1662 г. в местности гуннарског, вaрмланд, Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1693 г. в местности филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности филаделфя, филаделфя, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты.
